description: First successful build: 201 nodes, depth 0-5, 2 apex nodes (race condition), 8 failures. Apex is generic — distill prompt loses info.
Code-specific distill prompt. 203 nodes, depth 0-5. Topics now specific (Backend Services, Feature Modules, UI Framework). Still 2 apex nodes. 7 failures.
Concise extract prompt. 211 nodes, 3 failures (down from 7). 373s (down from 590s). Apex topics good but still 2 apex nodes. 3 remaining failures are >95k char files.

Semantic grouping pipeline v2.0. 125 nodes, 0 failures, single apex at L4. 7 L1 threads. Blind testers: 81+73=77 avg. Weak: build/deploy(5.5), data model(6.5), auth(7). Strong: naming(9.5), entities(9), headlines(8.5).
Enriched extract+distill prompts. 119 nodes, 2 failures, single apex L3. 5 threads. Blind testers: 84+76=80 avg. Data model(8), auth(8), entities(9.5). Build/deploy still 5/10 (fundamental gap).

8-14 threads, no junk drawers, size balance. 131 nodes, depth 0-5, single apex, 2 failures. 10 L1 threads. BUT carry-left orphan: "React Build & Viz Utils" strand carries verbatim L1→L5 never merging.
Target exactly 8 collapsed to 1 thread. Too rigid — reverted to 8-14 range.
Structured outputs + rich prompts + recursive clustering. 112 L0 → 10 L1 → 3 L2 → 1 L3 apex. 0 failures. Thread clustering succeeded on retry (opt-016 timed out at 554K prompt).
